loops.purpose: Scan Nationwide source folders and create a normalized source inventory for all states plus DC.
Maintain one build manifest entry per state/DC and advance ordinary build statuses without review blockers.
Draft official PDF overlay/AcroForm/hybrid work items and sample outputs where source PDFs exist.
Retry weak or missing field maps using AcroForm names, widgets, required fields, nearby text, and placeholders.
Draft custom pleading packets from Nationwide and coded state-pack materials when a pleading is appropriate.
Generate a guidance fallback packet for every state/DC so every jurisdiction has reviewable output.
Run structural QA over generated packets and record failures as review/build metadata.
Create QA, visual-review, source-review, and attorney-review artifacts for post-build review.
Prepare internal preview records and artifact paths without exposing unapproved output to live users.
Track official form file path, size, mtime, and hash metadata for future source-change detection.
